description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden cabinet with a paneled exterior and a dark, rich finish. The top surface features a prominent yellow and black warning symbol, suggesting it may store hazardous or sensitive materials. One side displays a keyhole with ornate metallic trim, indicating a lockable compartment, while another side has a cutout revealing a German flag motif and the year 1918, possibly referencing historical munitions. The front panel is marked with the word 'WARNING' in bold letters, reinforcing the sense of caution. The wood grain texture is consistent throughout, and the cabinet appears robust and heavy. There are no visible handles, but the presence of a keyhole suggests it can be opened with a key.
description: A large, paneled wooden cabinet with a warning symbol on top, a keyhole with ornate trim, and historical markings including a German flag and the year 1918.
description_view_0: This view shows a side with three irregular cutouts revealing a dark interior and partial text at the bottom.
description_view_1: This view displays a plain paneled wooden side with no visible markings or features.
description_view_2: This side features a cutout displaying a German flag motif and the year 1918 faintly visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: This view highlights the front with a large 'WARNING' label and a decorative metallic keyhole plate.
